title: Irrelevant Images and Broken Modal Interactions
user_profile: Frontend developer building a polished static recipe book website. Iterates through visual feedback and expects working interactive elements on first deployment.
summary:
Agent shipped broken interactions and irrelevant content in a recipe site build.
- Placeholder images from picsum.photos showed random landscapes instead of food
- Modal close button had no event listener, trapping users in detail view
- Extended plan-mode exploration delayed implementation until user interrupted

mitigations.title: Use content-relevant images
mitigations.action: Use curated, content-relevant image URLs from Unsplash CDN instead of random placeholder services like picsum.photos.

mitigations.title: Verify event listeners before shipping
mitigations.action: After writing interactive components (modals, dropdowns, forms), verify all event listeners are attached before declaring the feature complete.

mitigations.title: Smoke-test interactions before preview
mitigations.action: When deploying for visual review, run a quick Playwright interaction smoke test (open modal, close modal, filter, search) before presenting to the user.

friction_events.user_intention: See recipe cards with food images matching each dish
friction_events.description: Agent used random picsum.photos URLs producing unrelated landscape and object photos instead of food imagery.

friction_events.user_intention: Close the recipe detail modal overlay
friction_events.description: Modal close button had no event listener attached, trapping the user in the detail view with no way to dismiss it.

friction_events.user_intention: Start building the recipe book website quickly
friction_events.description: Agent spent extended time in plan mode with sub-agent exploration before the user interrupted to begin implementation directly.
